title: 2026 Oscar Predictions: Who's Winning in Each Category? | No Film School
text: No Film School's 2026 Oscar predictions for Best Film Editing highlight Marty Supreme as the expected winner with editors Ronald Bronstein and Josh Safdie. The article bases predictions on online chatter and which films are surging when, acknowledging that circumstances may change before the March 15 ceremony hosted by Conan O'Brien. The nominees for Best Film Editing are F1 (Apple) with Stephen Mirrione; Marty Supreme (A24) with Ronald Bronstein and Josh Safdie (predicted winner); One Battle After Another (Warner Bros.) with Andy Jurgensen; Sentimental Value (Neon) with Olivier Bugge Coutté; and Sinners (Warner Bros.) with Michael P. Shawver. The article emphasizes that editing is a crucial technical craft that directly impacts the viewer's emotional engagement with the story.
